objective: Root-cause and fix on dev the sol-subagent transport bug: upstream 400 Invalid 'input[N].id' '019f...' Expected an ID that begins with 'msg' when opencodex forwards Responses input items with harness UUID ids. Keep dev the ff baseline (stack on dev, no rebase/force-push). Dispatch sol repo-trace explorer + sol cxc-search researcher (Tier2-proven id-shape contract), implement provider-scoped sanitization preserving reasoning/function_call pairing + encrypted_content flows, add regression test for the failing shape, full bun test, push dev with CI green. Flag that live proxy restart is needed to activate. BLOCKED if fault is outside opencodex (then file issue upstream).

workPhases.title: Parallel root-cause: sol repo-trace explorer + sol cxc-search researcher

Implement provider-scoped id sanitization on dev
Regression test reproducing 019f-style input id failing shape
Full bun test + push dev + CI green; dev stays ff-descendant of main
